response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned video for audio content. 2. Identified instrumental music playing from 00:00 to 05:01 with a segment of spoken narration from 03:46 to 04:17. 3. Confirmed no vocal performances (singing) exist in this video. 4. Created scene mapping based on visual and content transitions.
response.global_summary: An introductory video/waiting room for the Ooco Kcomit Birthday Live 2020 event, featuring a 'Fall in Grace' title card and a short narrative segment, accompanied by instrumental music.

scenes.description: Introductory title card for 'Fall in Grace - Ooco Kcomit Birthday Live 2020'. Instrumental BGM is playing.
Visual transition to a dark screen.
Narrative segment with text on screen describing the 'heavenly Realm' and the three realms, accompanied by instrumental music.
Visual transition back to the introductory title card.
Return to the introductory title card for 'Fall in Grace'. Instrumental BGM continues.
